# Plan B Brazil

> Independent real estate investment advisory in Santa Catarina, Brazil.
> Konstantin Bievskikh, CRECI-SC 59616-F. Based in Florianópolis.
> Research-driven analysis for international investors buying property remotely.
> Languages: English, Russian, Portuguese.

Plan B Brazil is not a brokerage marketing arm. It publishes independent market
research on Santa Catarina real estate — district-level pricing, developer track
records, yield analysis, tax and residency implications — and advises foreign
investors (typically $150K–$500K) purchasing remotely.

## Coverage
- Cities: Florianópolis, Balneário Camboriú, Itapema, Porto Belo, Bombinhas
- Districts: Jurerê, Canasvieiras, Campeche, Lagoa da Conceição, Canto Grande, and others
- Topics: off-plan (planta) purchases, cota / co-investment structures, CUB indexation,
  rental yields, ITBI and capital gains, Brazilian investor visa (RN 36/2018)

## Research
- Market reports: https://planbbrazil.com/research/market-reports
- City reports: https://planbbrazil.com/research/city-reports
- District guides: https://planbbrazil.com/research/district-guides
- Developer reviews: https://planbbrazil.com/research/developer-reviews
- Guides: https://planbbrazil.com/research/guides
- All: https://planbbrazil.com/research/all

## Listings
- Properties: https://planbbrazil.com/#properties
- Individual projects: https://planbbrazil.com/projects/{slug}
